name: AI-powered CV screening and candidate analysis
description: Reads job application data from Google Sheets, uses Claude AI to screen and score each candidate against job requirements, and updates the spreadsheet with AI analysis results including scores, recommendations, and detailed feedback.

source.originalName: Automate CV screening with AI candidate analysis

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for reading applications and saving results

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting screening summary

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for screening results

jobTitle.description: Job title being hired for (e.g. 'Senior Frontend Engineer')

jobDescription.description: Full job description with requirements, qualifications, and responsibilities

candidateData.description: Candidate information (name, email, CV summary, skills, experience) as text or JSON

steps.name: Build AI prompt for CV screening
Run Claude AI for candidate screening
Format screening results for Google Sheets
Save screening results to Google Sheets
Build Slack Block Kit screening summary
